title: Von Thomas Next
description: An operations platform for catering workflows, admin tools, inbox handling, and order preparation.
body:
Von Thomas Next is an operations platform for catering and admin workflows.

The public summary is intentionally practical: the work connects order preparation, inbox handling, admin decisions, and operational edge cases into one web system. Recent work included same-day order handling, inbox visibility fixes, and keeping ordering preparation reproducible.

## What it supports

- Admin workflows for day-to-day operations.
- Inbox and communication visibility.
- Order preparation and operational exceptions.
- A more reliable path from customer input to kitchen-ready work.

## Public boundary

This page does not include client-private data, internal process details, or operational exports. It describes the software surface and the type of workflows it supports.
